name: Image Search
author: itz-mune
description: Search for freely-licensed images from DuckDuckGo, Unsplash, Pexels, or Pixabay. Used by File R/W when creating rich documents.
long_description:
Provides a `search_images` tool that returns direct image URLs from your chosen provider. DuckDuckGo works out of the box with no setup. Switch to Unsplash, Pexels, or Pixabay in settings for higher-quality results (free API key required).

Automatically integrates with the File R/W skill — when creating .docx, .pdf, or .html documents the agent calls this tool to find and embed relevant images.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release. DuckDuckGo (default), Unsplash, Pexels, Pixabay backends.

config_fields.label: Image provider
config_fields.help: DuckDuckGo works with no API key. The others need a free account key — set it below.

config_fields.label: Max results per search
config_fields.help: Maximum number of image results returned per query (1–10).

config_fields.label: Unsplash Access Key
config_fields.help: Get a free key at unsplash.com/developers

config_fields.label: Pexels API Key
config_fields.help: Get a free key at pexels.com/api

config_fields.label: Pixabay API Key
config_fields.help: Get a free key at pixabay.com/api/docs
